posts.author: MatthewTippett (Matthew Tippett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

create a link to a text note stored in the info box tab of an update in monday.com (so as to have just the link to the note to share in the update itself)?

What are you trying to achieve

Create a link to a text note stored in the info box tab of an update in monday.com so as to have just the link to the note to share in the update itself.

I pasted the text of a confirmation of an instruction for work from a client - into a text note stored in the info box tab of an update. I know that one could make an update occur having made the note - but that would just duplicate the full set of info and I wanted to be short and sharp in the Update and note have the full text, rather to link to it
